programme.title: Winter Heroes

programme.title: Winter Heroes
programme.desc: Spanish snowboarder Queralt Castellet shows that snowboarding is more than results – it’s about passion, resilience and freedom. Her fearless halfpipe style inspires the next generation of winter athletes.
programme.series-desc: Spanish snowboarder Queralt Castellet has competed since 2005 – and only gets better every season.

programme.title: Winter Heroes
programme.desc: Marcel Hirscher – arguably the best male ski racer ever – has returned from retirement to attempt the mother of all comebacks. And he’s doing it under a new flag.
programme.series-desc: Arguably the best male ski racer has returned from retirement to attempt the mother of all comebacks.

programme.title: Winter Heroes
programme.desc: With explosive and unpredictable runs, Alice Robinson is putting New Zealand on the podium in the traditionally European-dominated sport of alpine skiing. Discover a fearless athlete on the rise.
programme.series-desc: With explosive and unpredictable runs, Alice Robinson is putting New Zealand on the podium in alpine skiing.

programme.title: Winter Heroes
programme.desc: Not only a ski mountaineer, Paul Verbnjak is an army athlete, a professional road cyclist and a rising star in a sport that’s rapidly gaining world popularity. Find out what makes him tick.
programme.series-desc: This exciting Austrian ski mountaineer is a rising star in a sport that’s rapidly taking the world stage.

programme.title: Meet Arturo Coello, Ariana Sanchez, Fede Chingotto and Ale Salazar
programme.desc: Arturo Coello, Ariana Sanchez, Fede Chingotto and Ale Salazar offer a glimpse into their journey, the sacrifices made and the passion driving their success on and off the court.
programme.series-desc: Four stars. Four cities. One sport. Hear emotional journeys from the padel court to the heart of the game.

programme.title: Meet Claudia Fernández, Gemma Triay, Juan Lebrón and Mike Yanguas
programme.desc: Claudia Fernández, Gemma Triay, Juan Lebrón and Mike Yanguas give an inside look into their lives, training, competition and the vibrant community behind the world’s fastest-growing game.
programme.series-desc: Four padel players give an inside look into their lives and what makes the sport a global phenomenon.

programme.title: Valley Uprising
programme.desc: Valley Uprising is the riveting, unforgettable tale of the bold rock climbing tradition in Yosemite National Park: half a century of struggle against the laws of gravity -- and the laws of the land.
programme.series-desc: Join Alex Honnold for an inside look into how climbers carved out a counterculture lifestyle in Yosemite.

programme.title: Yamnuska: The Ragged Edge
programme.sub-title: Explore the legacy of Canada's climbing icon, Mount Yamnuska
programme.desc: Follow modern-day adventurers Vikki Weldon and Quentin Roberts as they embark on a climbing journey through time, celebrating the rich history of one of Canada’s most iconic cliffs, Mount Yamnuska.
programme.series-desc: Vikki Weldon and Quentin Roberts explore the enduring legacy of rock climbing on Canada's Mount Yamnuska.

programme.title: Sandro Dias redefines the limits of skateboarding
programme.desc: Sandro Dias brings to life the urban legend of skating down a building shaped like a quarter pipe, and redefines the limits of skateboarding. Watch as he sets two new world records.
programme.series-desc: Skateboarder Sandro Dias sets two world records descending from a 22-storey building in Porto Alegre, Brazil.

programme.title: Asa Vermette's Ascent
programme.sub-title: A rookie’s breakout year in downhill MTB
programme.desc: One of mountain biking’s most exciting young riders, Asa Vermette, has secured a Junior world title. Follow his journey as he faces downhill’s toughest race in his debut Red Bull Hardline season.
programme.series-desc: Follow Asa Vermette – one of mountain biking’s most exciting young riders – on his debut at Red Bull Hardline.

programme.title: For Reals
programme.sub-title: From F1 desert racing to a skatepark in the sky
programme.desc: Wakeskating off a Dubai skyscraper. F1 drivers racing on Floridan waters and in the Nevada desert. Riding a skatepark attached to a hot air balloon. It's all in a day's work for Red Bull athletes!
programme.series-desc: Red Bull athletes do it all, from riding a skatepark under a hot air balloon to F1 drivers racing on water.

programme.title: For Reals
programme.sub-title: From a pinball human to 93kph speed skating

programme.series-desc: Red Bull athletes do it all, from speed skating in Norway to BASE jumping from treacherous Mount Everest.

programme.title: For Reals

programme.series-desc: Red Bull athletes do it all, from freerunning through an airport to building a skatepark in the forest.

programme.title: For Reals
programme.sub-title: From a paper plane contest to diving off ruins

programme.title: For Reals
programme.sub-title: From skydiving with skis to flying into a volcano

programme.title: Risking it All
programme.desc: Loggers in Borneo struggle to transport giant wood logs on treacherous narrow forest trails and along dangerous rivers.
programme.series-desc:
Escaping the pressures of modern society proves to be an unforgettable and life-changing adventure as three families set out to live off the land. These families not only unplug their smartphones and tablets, but they also give up electricity and running water for a life off the grid in a drastic last resort to reconnect with each other. From attempting to save their marriage to dealing with family illness to regaining control of their relationships, each family has a different reason for embarking on the journey of a lifetime. The three families pack up their homes, say their good-byes to loved ones, and prepare for the challenges that come with trading in the luxuries of modern-day society for a self-sufficient life.
In a world where we have more forms of connection than ever before we tend to lose ourselves in the constant connectivity. “Risking It All” captures something many modern day families can relate to -- a strive and struggle to revisit building relationships and getting back to basics.

programme.title: The Stream
programme.sub-title: Palestine's Olive Season - Symbol of Steadfastness
programme.desc: Today on The Stream: We look at what this olive harvest really means for Palestinians and how it connects generations across the land.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.

programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. She has a daughter with Ji Ho, and she would do anything for her. However, she gets tragically betrayed by Ji Ho, the love of her life, over power and money. How will those two mothers end their fierce revenge?

programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. Coco-Kaichou often pitches products as commercial breaks such as her drug AsaCoco which can be inhaled, injected or consumed as a drink. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.sub-title: The Mapuche and the Myth of Chile

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: Powered by social media, The Stream brings fresh perspectives and new voices, beyond the headlines.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: A young Indigenous Embera woman travels from the city to Colombia's jungle to confront a suicide epidemic in her community.
programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. She recently found out her daughter is alive, so she plans to get her back and take her revenge. Meanwhile, Hye Soo is a strong girl who faces challenges head-on. She has a daughter with Ji Ho, and she would do anything for her. However, she gets tragically betrayed by Ji Ho, the love of her life, over power and money. How will those two mothers end their fierce revenge?

programme.title: Risking it All
programme.desc: A lack of basic infrastructure forces drivers and quarry workers to overcome all sorts of challenges to support their families in war-ravaged Sierra Leone.
programme.series-desc:
Escaping the pressures of modern society proves to be an unforgettable and life-changing adventure as three families set out to live off the land. These families not only unplug their smartphones and tablets, but they also give up electricity and running water for a life off the grid in a drastic last resort to reconnect with each other. From attempting to save their marriage to dealing with family illness to regaining control of their relationships, each family has a different reason for embarking on the journey of a lifetime. The three families pack up their homes, say their good-byes to loved ones, and prepare for the challenges that come with trading in the luxuries of modern-day society for a self-sufficient life.
In a world where we have more forms of connection than ever before we tend to lose ourselves in the constant connectivity. “Risking It All” captures something many modern day families can relate to -- a strive and struggle to revisit building relationships and getting back to basics.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: A young Indigenous Embera woman travels from the city to Colombia's jungle to confront a suicide epidemic in her community.
programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. She recently found out her daughter is alive, so she plans to get her back and take her revenge. Meanwhile, Hye Soo is a strong girl who faces challenges head-on. She has a daughter with Ji Ho, and she would do anything for her. However, she gets tragically betrayed by Ji Ho, the love of her life, over power and money. How will those two mothers end their fierce revenge?

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: Powered by social media, The Stream brings fresh perspectives and new voices, beyond the headlines.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.

programme.desc: What is being reported by world media and how? Richard Gizbert guides you through the global news maze.
programme.series-desc: Listening Post is Al Jazeera English's weekly media review show. It casts a critical eye over not just what gets reported, but how it's reported - covering the coverage of the news & analyzing global events through the prism of the media.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: A young Indigenous Embera woman travels from the city to Colombia's jungle to confront a suicide epidemic in her community.
programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. She recently found out her daughter is alive, so she plans to get her back and take her revenge. Meanwhile, Hye Soo is a strong girl who faces challenges head-on. She has a daughter with Ji Ho, and she would do anything for her. However, she gets tragically betrayed by Ji Ho, the love of her life, over power and money. How will those two mothers end their fierce revenge?

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: The Stream is where Al Jazeera's audience becomes a global community.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: A Yazidi teenager who survived ISIL captivity films herself to process her trauma as rescuers search for her missing family.
programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. programme.title: Risking it All
programme.desc: A lack of basic infrastructure forces drivers and quarry workers to overcome all sorts of challenges to support their families in war-ravaged Sierra Leone.
programme.series-desc:
Escaping the pressures of modern society proves to be an unforgettable and life-changing adventure as three families set out to live off the land. These families not only unplug their smartphones and tablets, but they also give up electricity and running water for a life off the grid in a drastic last resort to reconnect with each other. From attempting to save their marriage to dealing with family illness to regaining control of their relationships, each family has a different reason for embarking on the journey of a lifetime. The three families pack up their homes, say their good-byes to loved ones, and prepare for the challenges that come with trading in the luxuries of modern-day society for a self-sufficient life.
In a world where we have more forms of connection than ever before we tend to lose ourselves in the constant connectivity. “Risking It All” captures something many modern day families can relate to -- a strive and struggle to revisit building relationships and getting back to basics.
